---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem this feature would solve. Who benefits.

## Proposed solution

High-level approach. If applicable, which module(s) would be touched.

## Initiatic ordering check

- [ ] The prerequisite phases are green (see ROADMAP).
- [ ] The feature respects the initiatic order (no skipping phases).
- [ ] Hitlabshut is respected (no direct writes to `partzufim_state.overall_score`).

## Doctrinal anchoring

Primary sources that support this feature (EC-*, Z-*, other). If none, explain why the feature is operational rather than doctrinal.

## Alternatives considered

Other ways to solve the problem and why they were rejected.
